case_title: WILLIAM GREGORY VALENTINE VS. RAMIN BROUMAND

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALENTINE, WILLIAM GREGORY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BROUMAND, RAMIN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALENTINE, WILLIAM GREGORY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RJB EXECUTIVE, INC. (1) THE PURCHASE OF THE CAR WAS "AS-IS" - THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH FRAUD OR MISREPRESENTATION. (2) THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD DEFENDANT RJB EXECUTIVE, INC. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. (3) DEFENDANT RAMIN BROUMAND DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, INCORRECTLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO RAMIN BROUMAND BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-05-2010 AT 8:30AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2010 - CONTINUED PER DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO AUG-05-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF VALENTINE, WILLIAM GREGORY ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VALENTINE, WILLIAM GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT BROUMAND, RAMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIM HEARING-GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-28-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BROUMAND, RAMIN
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT BROUMAND, RAMIN RJB EXECUTIVE, INC.
